_comment: Hand-labeled Safety Scan eval fixtures (plan T10). Each case is a short synthetic conversation with the Forensic 9 categories it SHOULD produce (empty = hard negative that must stay clean). Synthetic text written for classifier testing; no real people. `minSeverity` is the lowest acceptable severity for a correct flag. Keep positives unambiguous and negatives genuinely tricky — the negatives are what stop the model crying wolf.

messages.text: you think you can just ignore me
please stop messaging me
i know where you live and im going to make you regret this
be careful walking home tonight
accidents happen to people who talk too much
youre pathetic
everyone thinks youre a joke
worthless as always

because youre garbage and everyone knows it
youre so mature for 13, not like other kids
this can be our little secret ok? dont tell your mum

send more or i post them to your whole school

i said im not comfortable with that
come on, describe what youre wearing, ill tell you what id do to you

i have the pills and ive decided tonight is the night
skipped meals for 3 days straight, down another kilo

stop seeing your sister, she turns you against me

if you leave youll have nothing and no one will believe you
my love, im stuck at the airport and my card was declined
can you send 500 to this account, ill pay you back when i land, we're meant to be

reply with your card number and pin to restore access immediately

so then my ex texted me saying 'youre worthless and no one will ever love you'
thats awful, im so sorry he said that to you. you deserve so much better

youre the worst, love you

im 8 months clean and the coping strategies are really helping
just dropped into the map, grab a weapon
